thesis_destination: Chapter 7 thermal negative-results and next-candidate evidence
caption_claim: Dominant TW5/TW6 residuals point away from passive wall/test-section selectors and toward a heated-incline/exchange-shape owner.
The residual is quantified and reassigned as a candidate-discovery signal, not as an internal-Nu fit term.
S12 identifies a better physical owner but releases zero S11-ready candidates because scoring, exchange-state, same-QOI UQ, and source/property gates fail.
